testcase.name: ValLogin

error.message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //input[@value="Login" because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//input[@value="Login"' is not a valid XPath expression. (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidselectorexception Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.6' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [1ed55f39fbb9823e961f2ec55a9255dd, findElement {using=xpath, value=//input[@value="Login"}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\user\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62890}, goog:processID: 28548, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62890/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 1ed55f39fbb9823e961f2ec55a9255dd
